# Working with Vaults | Intuition Docs

[Skip to main content](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

On this page

**Conceptual overview:** [Signals Fundamentals](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/primitives/Signals/fundamentals)

Vaults enable staking on atoms and triples through bonding curve-based share pricing. This guide covers deposits, redemptions, queries, and preview operations.

Table of Contents[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#table-of-contents "Direct link to Table of Contents")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Deposits](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#deposits)
    
*   [Redemptions](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#redemptions)
    
*   [Vault Queries](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#vault-queries)
    
*   [Preview Operations](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#preview-operations)
    

* * *

Deposits[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#deposits "Direct link to Deposits")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Deposit assets into atom or triple vaults to receive shares based on bonding curve pricing.

### deposit[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#deposit "Direct link to deposit")

Deposit assets into a single vault.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function deposit(  config: WriteConfig,  args: [    receiver: Address,    termId: Hex,    curveId: bigint,    assets: bigint,    minShares: bigint  ]): Promise<TransactionReceipt>

#### Parameters[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameter | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `receiver` | `Address` | Address receiving shares | Yes |
| `termId` | `Hex` | Atom or triple ID | Yes |
| `curveId` | `bigint` | Bonding curve ID (use 1n) | Yes |
| `assets` | `bigint` | Amount to deposit (wei) | Yes |
| `minShares` | `bigint` | Minimum shares to receive | Yes |

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import {  deposit,  createAtomFromString,  getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId,  intuitionTestnet,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'// Create atomconst atom = await createAtomFromString(config, 'DeFi')const vaultId = atom.state.termId// Deposit into vaultawait deposit(  { walletClient, publicClient, address },  [    walletClient.account.address, // receiver    vaultId,                       // termId    1n,                            // curveId (default curve)    parseEther('1'),               // deposit 1 TRUST    0n,                            // minShares (no slippage protection)  ])console.log('Deposited 1 TRUST into vault')

#### Advanced Example with Preview[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#advanced-example-with-preview "Direct link to Advanced Example with Preview")

    import {  deposit,  multiVaultPreviewDeposit,  multiVaultGetShares,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther, formatEther } from 'viem'async function depositWithPreview(vaultId: Hex, amount: bigint) {  try {    // Preview deposit    const expectedShares = await multiVaultPreviewDeposit(      { address, publicClient },      { args: [vaultId, 1n, amount] }    )    console.log('Depositing:', formatEther(amount), 'TRUST')    console.log('Expected shares:', expectedShares.toString())    // Execute deposit with slippage protection (2%)    const minShares = (expectedShares * 98n) / 100n    await deposit(      { walletClient, publicClient, address },      [        walletClient.account.address,        vaultId,        1n,        amount,        minShares, // 2% slippage tolerance      ]    )    // Check new balance    const shares = await multiVaultGetShares(      { address, publicClient },      { args: [walletClient.account.address, vaultId] }    )    console.log('Deposit successful')    console.log('Total shares:', shares.toString())  } catch (error) {    console.error('Deposit failed:', error)    throw error  }}

### batchDeposit[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#batchdeposit "Direct link to batchDeposit")

Deposit into multiple vaults in a single transaction.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature-1 "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function batchDeposit(  config: WriteConfig,  args: [    receiver: Address,    termIds: Hex[],    curveIds: bigint[],    assetsArray: bigint[],    minSharesArray: bigint[]  ]): Promise<TransactionReceipt>

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example-1 "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import { batchDeposit } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'// Deposit into 3 different vaultsawait batchDeposit(  { walletClient, publicClient, address },  [    walletClient.account.address,    [vault1, vault2, vault3],                              // termIds    [1n, 1n, 1n],                                          // curveIds    [parseEther('1'), parseEther('0.5'), parseEther('2')], // amounts    [0n, 0n, 0n],                                          // minShares  ])console.log('Deposited into 3 vaults')

### Common Use Cases[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#common-use-cases "Direct link to Common Use Cases")

#### Deposit into Atom Vault[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#deposit-into-atom-vault "Direct link to Deposit into Atom Vault")

    import { createAtomFromString, deposit } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'const atom = await createAtomFromString(config, 'TypeScript')await deposit(config, [  walletClient.account.address,  atom.state.termId,  1n,  parseEther('0.5'),  0n,])

#### Deposit into Triple Vault (FOR position)[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#deposit-into-triple-vault-for-position "Direct link to Deposit into Triple Vault (FOR position)")

    import { createTripleStatement, deposit } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'const triple = await createTripleStatement(config, tripleArgs)const tripleId = triple.state[0].args.tripleId// Deposit into FOR vaultawait deposit(config, [  walletClient.account.address,  tripleId,  1n,  parseEther('1'),  0n,])

#### Deposit into Counter Vault (AGAINST position)[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#deposit-into-counter-vault-against-position "Direct link to Deposit into Counter Vault (AGAINST position)")

    import { calculateCounterTripleId, deposit } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'const counterVaultId = calculateCounterTripleId(tripleId)// Deposit into AGAINST vaultawait deposit(config, [  walletClient.account.address,  counterVaultId,  1n,  parseEther('1'),  0n,])

### Understanding Shares[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#understanding-shares "Direct link to Understanding Shares")

#### Share Calculation[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#share-calculation "Direct link to Share Calculation")

Shares are calculated based on the bonding curve:

*   Early depositors get more shares per TRUST
*   Later depositors get fewer shares per TRUST
*   Share price increases with total deposits

#### Checking Share Balance[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#checking-share-balance "Direct link to Checking Share Balance")

    import { multiVaultGetShares } from '@0xintuition/sdk'const shares = await multiVaultGetShares(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [walletClient.account.address, vaultId] })console.log('Your shares:', shares.toString())

### Slippage Protection[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#slippage-protection "Direct link to Slippage Protection")

Set `minShares` to protect against price movement:

    // Get expected sharesconst expectedShares = await multiVaultPreviewDeposit(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [vaultId, 1n, depositAmount] })// Set 1% slippage toleranceconst minShares = (expectedShares * 99n) / 100nawait deposit(config, [  walletClient.account.address,  vaultId,  1n,  depositAmount,  minShares, // Transaction will revert if shares < minShares])

* * *

Redemptions[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#redemptions "Direct link to Redemptions")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Redeem shares from atom or triple vaults to receive assets back.

### redeem[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#redeem "Direct link to redeem")

Redeem shares from a single vault.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature-2 "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function redeem(  config: WriteConfig,  args: [    receiver: Address,    termId: Hex,    curveId: bigint,    shares: bigint,    minAssets: bigint  ]): Promise<TransactionReceipt>

#### Parameters[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#parameters-1 "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameter | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `receiver` | `Address` | Address receiving assets | Yes |
| `termId` | `Hex` | Atom or triple ID | Yes |
| `curveId` | `bigint` | Bonding curve ID (use 1n) | Yes |
| `shares` | `bigint` | Shares to redeem | Yes |
| `minAssets` | `bigint` | Minimum assets to receive | Yes |

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example-2 "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import {  redeem,  multiVaultGetShares,  getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId,  intuitionTestnet,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'// Get your share balanceconst shares = await multiVaultGetShares(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [walletClient.account.address, vaultId] })// Redeem all sharesawait redeem(  { walletClient, publicClient, address },  [    walletClient.account.address, // receiver    vaultId,                       // termId    1n,                            // curveId    shares,                        // redeem all shares    0n,                            // minAssets  ])console.log('Redeemed', shares.toString(), 'shares')

#### Advanced Example with Preview[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#advanced-example-with-preview-1 "Direct link to Advanced Example with Preview")

    import {  redeem,  multiVaultPreviewRedeem,  multiVaultGetShares,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { formatEther } from 'viem'async function redeemWithPreview(vaultId: Hex, sharesToRedeem: bigint) {  try {    // Preview redemption    const expectedAssets = await multiVaultPreviewRedeem(      { address, publicClient },      { args: [vaultId, 1n, sharesToRedeem] }    )    console.log('Redeeming shares:', sharesToRedeem.toString())    console.log('Expected assets:', formatEther(expectedAssets), 'TRUST')    // Execute with slippage protection (2%)    const minAssets = (expectedAssets * 98n) / 100n    await redeem(      { walletClient, publicClient, address },      [        walletClient.account.address,        vaultId,        1n,        sharesToRedeem,        minAssets,      ]    )    console.log('Redemption successful')  } catch (error) {    console.error('Redemption failed:', error)    throw error  }}

### batchRedeem[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#batchredeem "Direct link to batchRedeem")

Redeem shares from multiple vaults in a single transaction.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature-3 "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function batchRedeem(  config: WriteConfig,  args: [    receiver: Address,    termIds: Hex[],    curveIds: bigint[],    sharesArray: bigint[],    minAssetsArray: bigint[]  ]): Promise<TransactionReceipt>

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example-3 "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import { batchRedeem } from '@0xintuition/sdk'// Redeem from 3 vaultsawait batchRedeem(  { walletClient, publicClient, address },  [    walletClient.account.address,    [vault1, vault2, vault3],     // termIds    [1n, 1n, 1n],                  // curveIds    [shares1, shares2, shares3],   // shares to redeem    [0n, 0n, 0n],                  // minAssets  ])console.log('Redeemed from 3 vaults')

### Common Use Cases[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#common-use-cases-1 "Direct link to Common Use Cases")

#### Exit a Position[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#exit-a-position "Direct link to Exit a Position")

    import { multiVaultGetShares, redeem } from '@0xintuition/sdk'// Get all sharesconst shares = await multiVaultGetShares(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [walletClient.account.address, vaultId] })// Redeem allawait redeem(config, [  walletClient.account.address,  vaultId,  1n,  shares,  0n,])

#### Partial Redemption[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#partial-redemption "Direct link to Partial Redemption")

    // Redeem 50% of sharesconst totalShares = await multiVaultGetShares(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [walletClient.account.address, vaultId] })const halfShares = totalShares / 2nawait redeem(config, [  walletClient.account.address,  vaultId,  1n,  halfShares,  0n,])

### Understanding Exit Fees[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#understanding-exit-fees "Direct link to Understanding Exit Fees")

Redemptions may include exit fees:

    import { multiVaultExitFeeAmount } from '@0xintuition/sdk'// Calculate exit feeconst exitFee = await multiVaultExitFeeAmount(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [vaultId, assets] })console.log('Exit fee:', formatEther(exitFee), 'TRUST')

### Slippage Protection[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#slippage-protection-1 "Direct link to Slippage Protection")

Set `minAssets` to protect against price movement:

    // Preview redemptionconst expectedAssets = await multiVaultPreviewRedeem(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [vaultId, 1n, shares] })// Set 1% slippage toleranceconst minAssets = (expectedAssets * 99n) / 100nawait redeem(config, [  walletClient.account.address,  vaultId,  1n,  shares,  minAssets, // Transaction reverts if assets < minAssets])

* * *

Vault Queries[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#vault-queries "Direct link to Vault Queries")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Query vault information including share balances, vault details, and asset conversions.

### multiVaultGetShares[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#multivaultgetshares "Direct link to multiVaultGetShares")

Get a user's share balance in a vault.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature-4 "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function multiVaultGetShares(  config: ReadConfig,  args: { args: [account: Address, termId: Hex] }): Promise<bigint>

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example-4 "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import { multiVaultGetShares } from '@0xintuition/sdk'const shares = await multiVaultGetShares(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [walletClient.account.address, vaultId] })console.log('Your shares:', shares.toString())

### multiVaultGetVault[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#multivaultgetvault "Direct link to multiVaultGetVault")

Get comprehensive vault details.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature-5 "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function multiVaultGetVault(  config: ReadConfig,  args: { args: [termId: Hex] }): Promise<VaultDetails>

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example-5 "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import { multiVaultGetVault } from '@0xintuition/sdk'const vault = await multiVaultGetVault(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [vaultId] })console.log('Total assets:', vault.totalAssets)console.log('Total shares:', vault.totalShares)

### multiVaultCurrentSharePrice[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#multivaultcurrentshareprice "Direct link to multiVaultCurrentSharePrice")

Get the current share price for a vault.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature-6 "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function multiVaultCurrentSharePrice(  config: ReadConfig,  args: { args: [termId: Hex, curveId: bigint] }): Promise<bigint>

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example-6 "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import { multiVaultCurrentSharePrice } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { formatEther } from 'viem'const price = await multiVaultCurrentSharePrice(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [vaultId, 1n] })console.log('Share price:', formatEther(price), 'TRUST')

* * *

Preview Operations[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#preview-operations "Direct link to Preview Operations")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Preview deposit and redemption operations to calculate expected outcomes before executing transactions.

### multiVaultPreviewDeposit[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#multivaultpreviewdeposit "Direct link to multiVaultPreviewDeposit")

Preview how many shares you'll receive for a deposit.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature-7 "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function multiVaultPreviewDeposit(  config: ReadConfig,  args: { args: [termId: Hex, curveId: bigint, assets: bigint] }): Promise<bigint>

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example-7 "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import { multiVaultPreviewDeposit } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther, formatEther } from 'viem'const assets = parseEther('1')const expectedShares = await multiVaultPreviewDeposit(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [vaultId, 1n, assets] })console.log('Depositing:', formatEther(assets), 'TRUST')console.log('Expected shares:', expectedShares.toString())

### multiVaultPreviewRedeem[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#multivaultpreviewredeem "Direct link to multiVaultPreviewRedeem")

Preview how many assets you'll receive for redeeming shares.

#### Function Signature[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#function-signature-8 "Direct link to Function Signature")

    function multiVaultPreviewRedeem(  config: ReadConfig,  args: { args: [termId: Hex, curveId: bigint, shares: bigint] }): Promise<bigint>

#### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#basic-example-8 "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import { multiVaultPreviewRedeem } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { formatEther } from 'viem'const shares = 1000000nconst expectedAssets = await multiVaultPreviewRedeem(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [vaultId, 1n, shares] })console.log('Redeeming:', shares.toString(), 'shares')console.log('Expected assets:', formatEther(expectedAssets), 'TRUST')

### Use Cases[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#use-cases "Direct link to Use Cases")

#### Calculate Slippage Protection[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#calculate-slippage-protection "Direct link to Calculate Slippage Protection")

    import { multiVaultPreviewDeposit, deposit } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'const depositAmount = parseEther('1')// Previewconst expectedShares = await multiVaultPreviewDeposit(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [vaultId, 1n, depositAmount] })// Set 2% slippage toleranceconst minShares = (expectedShares * 98n) / 100n// Deposit with protectionawait deposit(config, [  walletClient.account.address,  vaultId,  1n,  depositAmount,  minShares,])

#### Compare Multiple Vaults[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#compare-multiple-vaults "Direct link to Compare Multiple Vaults")

    import { multiVaultPreviewDeposit } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'const amount = parseEther('1')const vaults = [vault1, vault2, vault3]// Preview all vaultsconst previews = await Promise.all(  vaults.map(vaultId =>    multiVaultPreviewDeposit(      { address, publicClient },      { args: [vaultId, 1n, amount] }    )  ))// Find best vaultconst bestIndex = previews.indexOf(Math.max(...previews.map(Number)))console.log('Best vault:', vaults[bestIndex])

* * *

Complete Examples[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/vaults-guide#complete-examples "Direct link to Complete Examples")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Trust Mechanisms Overview | Intuition Docs

[Skip to main content](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

On this page

Intuition creates a decentralized trust layer through its primitives and economic incentives. This guide explains how trust emerges and is validated in the system.

Many-to-One Attestations[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#many-to-one-attestations "Direct link to Many-to-One Attestations")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Unlike traditional systems where a single authority issues certificates or attestations, Intuition enables **many-to-one non-deterministic attestations**:

### Key Characteristics[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#key-characteristics "Direct link to Key Characteristics")

*   **Multiple Validators**: Any number of users can signal their belief
*   **Weighted Consensus**: Aggregate signal determines confidence level
*   **No Single Point of Failure**: Truth emerges from collective validation
*   **Dynamic Evolution**: Attestations change as new information emerges

Trust Generation Mechanisms[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#trust-generation-mechanisms "Direct link to Trust Generation Mechanisms")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Explicit Trust[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#explicit-trust "Direct link to Explicit Trust")

Direct attestations through staking:

*   Users lock tokens to express belief
*   Economic skin in the game
*   Clear, verifiable positions
*   Trackable over time

### Implicit Trust[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#implicit-trust "Direct link to Implicit Trust")

Derived from usage patterns:

*   Frequency of references
*   Inclusion in applications
*   Query patterns
*   Network effects

### Transitive Trust[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#transitive-trust "Direct link to Transitive Trust")

Trust propagates through relationships:

*   Trusted sources carry more weight
*   Web-of-trust effects
*   Personalized trust graphs
*   Reality Tunnels leverage this

Attestation Types[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#attestation-types "Direct link to Attestation Types")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Identity Attestations[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#identity-attestations "Direct link to Identity Attestations")

Verifying entities are who they claim:

    [Address X] - [is controlled by] - [Person Y][Account] - [verified by] - [KYC Provider]

### Fact Attestations[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#fact-attestations "Direct link to Fact Attestations")

Asserting truth of statements:

    [Company X] - [acquired] - [Company Y][Event Z] - [occurred on] - [Date]

### Credential Attestations[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#credential-attestations "Direct link to Credential Attestations")

Verifying qualifications:

    [Person] - [has degree from] - [University][Developer] - [contributed to] - [Project]

Trust Evaluation[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#trust-evaluation "Direct link to Trust Evaluation")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Factors Considered[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#factors-considered "Direct link to Factors Considered")

1.  **Stake Amount**: Economic backing of claim
2.  **Attestor Quality**: Reputation and history
3.  **Attestor Diversity**: Number of independent validators
4.  **Time Factor**: How long has consensus held
5.  **Counter-Signal**: Strength of opposing views

### Consensus Calculation[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#consensus-calculation "Direct link to Consensus Calculation")

    // Example simplified consensusconst totalFor = sumStakes(positiveAttestors)const totalAgainst = sumStakes(negativeAttestors)const consensus = totalFor / (totalFor + totalAgainst)// Weighted by attestor reputationconst weightedConsensus = sumWeightedStakes(attestors, reputations)

Trust Discovery[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#trust-discovery "Direct link to Trust Discovery")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Finding Trusted Data[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#finding-trusted-data "Direct link to Finding Trusted Data")

Users can filter information by trust criteria:

    // Minimum trust thresholdsconst trustedClaims = query({  minStake: 10000,  minConsensus: 0.8,  minAttestors: 10})// Specific attestor requirementsconst verified = query({  requireSignalFrom: ["Official Source", "Domain Expert"]})

### Reality Tunnels[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#reality-tunnels "Direct link to Reality Tunnels")

Create personalized trust lenses:

*   Define whose signals matter to you
*   Weight different attestor types
*   Filter based on trust criteria
*   Multiple valid worldviews

Verification Mechanisms[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#verification-mechanisms "Direct link to Verification Mechanisms")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### On-Chain Verification[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#on-chain-verification "Direct link to On-Chain Verification")

*   All stakes are transparent
*   View who attested to what
*   See stake amounts and timing
*   Verify bonding curve positions

### Off-Chain Verification[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#off-chain-verification "Direct link to Off-Chain Verification")

*   IPFS-stored data integrity
*   DID document validation
*   External source linking
*   Cross-reference checking

Trust Building Over Time[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#trust-building-over-time "Direct link to Trust Building Over Time")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Reputation Accumulation[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#reputation-accumulation "Direct link to Reputation Accumulation")

*   Consistent accurate signals build reputation
*   Early correct attestations rewarded
*   Historical track record visible
*   Stake-weighted influence

### Network Effects[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#network-effects "Direct link to Network Effects")

*   More participants increase reliability
*   Diverse attestors strengthen consensus
*   Cross-validation improves accuracy
*   System self-improves

Trust Anti-Patterns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#trust-anti-patterns "Direct link to Trust Anti-Patterns")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Centralization Risks[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#centralization-risks "Direct link to Centralization Risks")

*   Whale dominance
*   Cartel formation
*   Sybil attempts
*   Mitigated through diverse signals

### Quality Issues[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#quality-issues "Direct link to Quality Issues")

*   Popularity ≠ accuracy
*   Echo chambers
*   Misinformation campaigns
*   Addressed through counter-signals

* * *

Next Steps[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#next-steps "Direct link to Next Steps")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Signal Fundamentals](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/primitives/signals/fundamentals)

*   [Many-to-One Attestations](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#many-to-one-attestations)
    *   [Key Characteristics](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#key-characteristics)

    *   [Transitive Trust](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#transitive-trust)
        
*   [Attestation Types](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#attestation-types)
    *   [Identity Attestations](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#identity-attestations)
        
    *   [Fact Attestations](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#fact-attestations)
        
    *   [Credential Attestations](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#credential-attestations)

    *   [Factors Considered](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-concepts/trust-mechanisms#factors-considered)

# TanStack Query Integration | Intuition Docs

[Skip to main content](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

On this page

Integrate the Intuition SDK with TanStack Query (React Query) for powerful data fetching, caching, and synchronization.

Setup[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#setup "Direct link to Setup")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    npm install @tanstack/react-query

App.tsx

    import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query'const queryClient = new QueryClient()function App() {  return (    <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>      <YourApp />    </QueryClientProvider>  )}

Query Hooks[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#query-hooks "Direct link to Query Hooks")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Create reusable query hooks for SDK functions:

### useAtomDetails[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#useatomdetails "Direct link to useAtomDetails")

hooks/useAtomDetails.ts

    import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'import { getAtomDetails } from '@0xintuition/sdk'export function useAtomDetails(atomId: string | undefined) {  return useQuery({    queryKey: ['atom', atomId],    queryFn: () => atomId ? getAtomDetails(atomId) : null,    enabled: !!atomId,    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes  })}

### useGlobalSearch[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#useglobalsearch "Direct link to useGlobalSearch")

hooks/useGlobalSearch.ts

    import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'import { globalSearch } from '@0xintuition/sdk'export function useGlobalSearch(  query: string,  options?: { atomsLimit?: number }) {  return useQuery({    queryKey: ['search', query, options],    queryFn: () => globalSearch(query, options),    enabled: query.length > 2,    staleTime: 1000 * 60, // 1 minute  })}

Mutation Hooks[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#mutation-hooks "Direct link to Mutation Hooks")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Create mutation hooks for write operations:

### useCreateAtom[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#usecreateatom "Direct link to useCreateAtom")

hooks/useCreateAtom.ts

    import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'import { usePublicClient, useWalletClient, useChainId } from 'wagmi'import {  createAtomFromString,  getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'export function useCreateAtom() {  const queryClient = useQueryClient()  const chainId = useChainId()  const publicClient = usePublicClient()  const { data: walletClient } = useWalletClient()  return useMutation({    mutationFn: async ({ data, deposit }: { data: string, deposit?: string }) => {      if (!publicClient || !walletClient) {        throw new Error('Wallet not connected')      }      const address = getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId(chainId)      return createAtomFromString(        { walletClient, publicClient, address },        data,        deposit ? parseEther(deposit) : undefined      )    },    onSuccess: (result) => {      // Invalidate search queries to refetch      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['search'] })      // Optionally prefetch the new atom details      queryClient.setQueryData(['atom', result.state.termId], result)    },  })}

### useCreateTriple[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#usecreatetriple "Direct link to useCreateTriple")

hooks/useCreateTriple.ts

    import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'import { usePublicClient, useWalletClient, useChainId } from 'wagmi'import {  createTripleStatement,  getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'export function useCreateTriple() {  const queryClient = useQueryClient()  const chainId = useChainId()  const publicClient = usePublicClient()  const { data: walletClient } = useWalletClient()  return useMutation({    mutationFn: async ({      subjectId,      predicateId,      objectId,      deposit,    }: {      subjectId: string      predicateId: string      objectId: string      deposit: string    }) => {      if (!publicClient || !walletClient) {        throw new Error('Wallet not connected')      }      const address = getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId(chainId)      const depositAmount = parseEther(deposit)      return createTripleStatement(        { walletClient, publicClient, address },        {          args: [            [subjectId as `0x${string}`],            [predicateId as `0x${string}`],            [objectId as `0x${string}`],            [depositAmount],          ],          value: depositAmount,        }      )    },    onSuccess: () => {      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['search'] })      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['triple'] })    },  })}

Complete Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#complete-example "Direct link to Complete Example")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Full React component with TanStack Query:

AtomExplorer.tsx

    import { useState } from 'react'import { useCreateAtom, useGlobalSearch, useAtomDetails } from './hooks'export function AtomExplorer() {  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')  const [newAtomData, setNewAtomData] = useState('')  const [selectedAtomId, setSelectedAtomId] = useState<string>()  // Queries  const search = useGlobalSearch(searchQuery, { atomsLimit: 10 })  const atomDetails = useAtomDetails(selectedAtomId)  // Mutations  const createAtom = useCreateAtom()  const handleCreateAtom = async () => {    try {      const result = await createAtom.mutateAsync({        data: newAtomData,        deposit: '0.01',      })      setNewAtomData('')      setSelectedAtomId(result.state.termId)    } catch (error) {      console.error('Failed to create atom:', error)    }  }  return (    <div>      {/* Search */}      <div>        <h3>Search Atoms</h3>        <input          value={searchQuery}          onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}          placeholder="Search..."        />        {search.isLoading && <p>Searching...</p>}        {search.data?.atoms.map(atom => (          <div            key={atom.id}            onClick={() => setSelectedAtomId(atom.id)}            style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }}          >            {atom.label}          </div>        ))}      </div>      {/* Create */}      <div>        <h3>Create Atom</h3>        <input          value={newAtomData}          onChange={(e) => setNewAtomData(e.target.value)}          placeholder="Atom data..."        />        <button          onClick={handleCreateAtom}          disabled={createAtom.isPending || !newAtomData}        >          {createAtom.isPending ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}        </button>        {createAtom.isError && (          <p>Error: {createAtom.error.message}</p>        )}      </div>      {/* Details */}      {selectedAtomId && (        <div>          <h3>Atom Details</h3>          {atomDetails.isLoading && <p>Loading...</p>}          {atomDetails.data && (            <div>              <p>Label: {atomDetails.data.label}</p>              <p>Creator: {atomDetails.data.creator}</p>              <p>Shares: {atomDetails.data.vault.totalShares}</p>            </div>          )}        </div>      )}    </div>  )}

Advanced Patterns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#advanced-patterns "Direct link to Advanced Patterns")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Optimistic Updates[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#optimistic-updates "Direct link to Optimistic Updates")

    const createAtom = useMutation({  mutationFn: createAtomFunction,  onMutate: async (newAtom) => {    // Cancel outgoing refetches    await queryClient.cancelQueries({ queryKey: ['search'] })    // Snapshot previous value    const previous = queryClient.getQueryData(['search'])    // Optimistically update    queryClient.setQueryData(['search'], (old: any) => ({      ...old,      atoms: [...(old?.atoms || []), { id: 'temp', label: newAtom.data }],    }))    return { previous }  },  onError: (err, newAtom, context) => {    // Rollback on error    queryClient.setQueryData(['search'], context?.previous)  },  onSettled: () => {    queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['search'] })  },})

### Dependent Queries[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/tanstack-query#dependent-queries "Direct link to Dependent Queries")

    function AtomWithTriples({ atomId }: { atomId: string }) {  const atom = useAtomDetails(atomId)  const triples = useQuery({    queryKey: ['triples', atomId],    queryFn: () => fetchTriplesForAtom(atomId),    enabled: !!atom.data, // Only fetch when atom is loaded  })  return (/* ... */)}

# Triple Functions | Intuition Docs

[Skip to main content](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

On this page

Functions for creating and managing triples (statements) in the MultiVault contract.

multiVaultCreateTriples[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultcreatetriples "Direct link to multiVaultCreateTriples")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Create one or more triples (subject-predicate-object statements).

### Parameters[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameter | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| config | `WriteConfig` | Contract address, publicClient, walletClient | Yes |
| args | `[bytes32[], bytes32[], bytes32[], bigint[]]` | Subject IDs, predicate IDs, object IDs, deposit amounts | Yes |
| value | `bigint` | Total ETH to send | Yes |

### Returns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#returns "Direct link to Returns")

    Promise<Hash> // Transaction hash

### Basic Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#basic-example "Direct link to Basic Example")

    import { multiVaultCreateTriples, multiVaultGetTripleCost } from '@0xintuition/protocol'const tripleCost = await multiVaultGetTripleCost({ address, publicClient })const txHash = await multiVaultCreateTriples(  { address, walletClient, publicClient },  {    args: [      [subjectId],      [predicateId],      [objectId],      [tripleCost],    ],    value: tripleCost,  })

### Advanced Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#advanced-example "Direct link to Advanced Example")

    import { parseEther } from 'viem'import { eventParseTripleCreated } from '@0xintuition/protocol'const tripleCost = await multiVaultGetTripleCost({ address, publicClient })// Create multiple triplesconst subjects = [aliceId, bobId, charlieId]const predicates = [followsId, followsId, followsId]const objects = [bobId, charlieId, aliceId]const deposits = subjects.map(() => tripleCost + parseEther('0.1'))const totalValue = deposits.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0n)const txHash = await multiVaultCreateTriples(  { address, walletClient, publicClient },  {    args: [subjects, predicates, objects, deposits],    value: totalValue,  })const events = await eventParseTripleCreated(publicClient, txHash)console.log('Created triple IDs:', events.map(e => e.args.tripleId))

### Related Functions[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#related-functions "Direct link to Related Functions")

*   [multiVaultGetTriple](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultgettriple)
     - Query triple details
*   [multiVaultGetTripleCost](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultgettriplecost)
     - Get creation cost

* * *

multiVaultGetTriple[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultgettriple "Direct link to multiVaultGetTriple")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Query triple details by ID.

### Parameters[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#parameters-1 "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameter | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| config | `ReadConfig` | Contract address and publicClient | Yes |
| args | `[bytes32]` | Triple ID | Yes |

### Returns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#returns-1 "Direct link to Returns")

    Promise<[bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint]>// [id, subjectId, predicateId, objectId, counterVaultId, creatorAtomId]

### Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#example "Direct link to Example")

    const triple = await multiVaultGetTriple({ address, publicClient }, { args: [tripleId] })console.log('Triple ID:', triple[0])console.log('Subject:', triple[1])console.log('Predicate:', triple[2])console.log('Object:', triple[3])console.log('Counter vault:', triple[4])console.log('Creator:', triple[5])

* * *

multiVaultGetTripleCost[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultgettriplecost "Direct link to multiVaultGetTripleCost")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get the base cost to create a triple.

### Returns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#returns-2 "Direct link to Returns")

    Promise<bigint> // Triple creation cost in wei

### Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#example-1 "Direct link to Example")

    import { formatEther } from 'viem'const cost = await multiVaultGetTripleCost({ address, publicClient })console.log('Triple cost:', formatEther(cost), 'ETH')

* * *

multiVaultIsTriple[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultistriple "Direct link to multiVaultIsTriple")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check if a vault ID represents a triple.

### Parameters[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#parameters-2 "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameter | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| config | `ReadConfig` | Contract address and publicClient | Yes |
| args | `[bytes32]` | Vault ID to check | Yes |

### Returns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#returns-3 "Direct link to Returns")

    Promise<boolean>

### Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#example-2 "Direct link to Example")

    const isTriple = await multiVaultIsTriple({ address, publicClient }, { args: [vaultId] })if (isTriple) {  console.log('This is a triple vault')} else {  console.log('This is an atom vault')}

* * *

multiVaultIsCounterTriple[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultiscountertriple "Direct link to multiVaultIsCounterTriple")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check if two triples are counter-triples (opposing positions).

### Parameters[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#parameters-3 "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameter | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| config | `ReadConfig` | Contract address and publicClient | Yes |
| args | `[bytes32, bytes32]` | Two triple IDs to compare | Yes |

### Returns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#returns-4 "Direct link to Returns")

    Promise<boolean>

### Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#example-3 "Direct link to Example")

    const isCounter = await multiVaultIsCounterTriple(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [tripleId1, tripleId2] })if (isCounter) {  console.log('These triples represent opposing positions')}

* * *

multiVaultGetInverseTripleId[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultgetinversetripleid "Direct link to multiVaultGetInverseTripleId")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get the counter-triple ID for a given triple.

### Parameters[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#parameters-4 "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameter | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| config | `ReadConfig` | Contract address and publicClient | Yes |
| args | `[bytes32]` | Triple ID | Yes |

### Returns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#returns-5 "Direct link to Returns")

    Promise<bigint> // Counter-triple vault ID

### Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#example-4 "Direct link to Example")

    const inverseId = await multiVaultGetInverseTripleId(  { address, publicClient },  { args: [tripleId] })// Deposit to counter-triple (stake against)const txHash = await multiVaultDeposit(  { address, walletClient, publicClient },  {    args: [account.address, inverseId, curveId, minShares],    value: depositAmount,  })

* * *

multiVaultCreateTriplesEncode[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#multivaultcreatetriplesencode "Direct link to multiVaultCreateTriplesEncode")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Encode triple creation call data.

### Parameters[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#parameters-5 "Direct link to Parameters")

| Parameter | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subjects | `bytes32[]` | Subject atom IDs | Yes |
| predicates | `bytes32[]` | Predicate atom IDs | Yes |
| objects | `bytes32[]` | Object atom IDs | Yes |
| deposits | `bigint[]` | Deposit amounts | Yes |

### Returns[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#returns-6 "Direct link to Returns")

    Hex // Encoded function call data

### Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/protocol/api-reference/multivault/triples#example-5 "Direct link to Example")

    const data = multiVaultCreateTriplesEncode(  [subjectId],  [predicateId],  [objectId],  [tripleCost])const tx = {  to: address,  data,  value: tripleCost,}const hash = await walletClient.sendTransaction(tx)

* * *

# React Integration | Intuition Docs

[Skip to main content](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/react#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

On this page

Use the Intuition SDK with React applications via Wagmi hooks for wallet connectivity and blockchain interactions.

Setup[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/react#setup "Direct link to Setup")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Install required dependencies:

    npm install wagmi viem @tanstack/react-query

Wagmi Configuration[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/react#wagmi-configuration "Direct link to Wagmi Configuration")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Set up Wagmi provider in your app:

wagmi-config.ts

    import { http, createConfig } from 'wagmi'import { intuitionTestnet } from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { injected } from 'wagmi/connectors'export const config = createConfig({  chains: [intuitionTestnet],  connectors: [injected()],  transports: {    [intuitionTestnet.id]: http(),  },})

App.tsx

    import { WagmiProvider } from 'wagmi'import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query'import { config } from './wagmi-config'const queryClient = new QueryClient()function App() {  return (    <WagmiProvider config={config}>      <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>        <YourApp />      </QueryClientProvider>    </WagmiProvider>  )}

Creating Atoms[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/react#creating-atoms "Direct link to Creating Atoms")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Use SDK functions with Wagmi hooks:

CreateAtomButton.tsx

    import { usePublicClient, useWalletClient, useChainId } from 'wagmi'import {  createAtomFromString,  getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'import { useState } from 'react'export function CreateAtomButton() {  const chainId = useChainId()  const publicClient = usePublicClient()  const { data: walletClient } = useWalletClient()  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)  const [atomId, setAtomId] = useState<string | null>(null)  const handleCreateAtom = async () => {    if (!publicClient || !walletClient) {      alert('Connect wallet first')      return    }    setLoading(true)    try {      const address = getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId(chainId)      const atom = await createAtomFromString(        { walletClient, publicClient, address },        'My Atom',        parseEther('0.01')      )      setAtomId(atom.state.termId)      console.log('Created atom:', atom.state.termId)    } catch (error) {      console.error('Error:', error)      alert('Failed to create atom')    } finally {      setLoading(false)    }  }  return (    <div>      <button onClick={handleCreateAtom} disabled={loading || !walletClient}>        {loading ? 'Creating...' : 'Create Atom'}      </button>      {atomId && <p>Created: {atomId}</p>}    </div>  )}

Custom Hooks[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/react#custom-hooks "Direct link to Custom Hooks")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Create reusable hooks for SDK operations:

useCreateAtom.ts

    import { useMutation } from '@tanstack/react-query'import { usePublicClient, useWalletClient, useChainId } from 'wagmi'import {  createAtomFromString,  getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'export function useCreateAtom() {  const chainId = useChainId()  const publicClient = usePublicClient()  const { data: walletClient } = useWalletClient()  return useMutation({    mutationFn: async ({ data, deposit }: { data: string, deposit?: string }) => {      if (!publicClient || !walletClient) {        throw new Error('Wallet not connected')      }      const address = getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId(chainId)      return createAtomFromString(        { walletClient, publicClient, address },        data,        deposit ? parseEther(deposit) : undefined      )    },  })}// Usage in componentfunction MyComponent() {  const createAtom = useCreateAtom()  const handleCreate = async () => {    const result = await createAtom.mutateAsync({      data: 'My Atom',      deposit: '0.01',    })    console.log('Created:', result.state.termId)  }  return (    <button      onClick={handleCreate}      disabled={createAtom.isPending}    >      {createAtom.isPending ? 'Creating...' : 'Create Atom'}    </button>  )}

Query Hooks[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/react#query-hooks "Direct link to Query Hooks")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fetch data with React Query:

useAtomDetails.ts

    import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'import { getAtomDetails } from '@0xintuition/sdk'export function useAtomDetails(atomId: string | undefined) {  return useQuery({    queryKey: ['atom', atomId],    queryFn: () => atomId ? getAtomDetails(atomId) : null,    enabled: !!atomId,    staleTime: 30000, // 30 seconds  })}// Usagefunction AtomDisplay({ atomId }: { atomId: string }) {  const { data: atom, isLoading, error } = useAtomDetails(atomId)  if (isLoading) return <div>Loading...</div>  if (error) return <div>Error loading atom</div>  if (!atom) return null  return (    <div>      <h3>{atom.label}</h3>      <p>Creator: {atom.creator}</p>      <p>Shares: {atom.vault.totalShares}</p>    </div>  )}

Complete Example[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/react#complete-example "Direct link to Complete Example")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Full-featured React component:

AtomManager.tsx

    import { useState } from 'react'import { useAccount, usePublicClient, useWalletClient, useChainId } from 'wagmi'import { useQuery, useMutation } from '@tanstack/react-query'import {  createAtomFromString,  getAtomDetails,  globalSearch,  getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId,} from '@0xintuition/sdk'import { parseEther } from 'viem'export function AtomManager() {  const chainId = useChainId()  const { address: accountAddress } = useAccount()  const publicClient = usePublicClient()  const { data: walletClient } = useWalletClient()  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')  const [newAtomData, setNewAtomData] = useState('')  // Search atoms  const { data: searchResults } = useQuery({    queryKey: ['search', searchQuery],    queryFn: () => globalSearch(searchQuery, { atomsLimit: 10 }),    enabled: searchQuery.length > 2,  })  // Create atom mutation  const createAtom = useMutation({    mutationFn: async (data: string) => {      if (!publicClient || !walletClient) throw new Error('Not connected')      const address = getMultiVaultAddressFromChainId(chainId)      return createAtomFromString(        { walletClient, publicClient, address },        data,        parseEther('0.01')      )    },    onSuccess: (result) => {      console.log('Created:', result.state.termId)      setNewAtomData('')    },  })  return (    <div>      <h2>Atom Manager</h2>      {/* Search */}      <div>        <h3>Search Atoms</h3>        <input          type="text"          value={searchQuery}          onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}          placeholder="Search..."        />        {searchResults?.atoms.map(atom => (          <div key={atom.id}>{atom.label}</div>        ))}      </div>      {/* Create */}      <div>        <h3>Create Atom</h3>        <input          type="text"          value={newAtomData}          onChange={(e) => setNewAtomData(e.target.value)}          placeholder="Atom data..."        />        <button          onClick={() => createAtom.mutate(newAtomData)}          disabled={!accountAddress || createAtom.isPending}        >          {createAtom.isPending ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}        </button>      </div>    </div>  )}

Related Resources[​](https://www.docs.intuition.systems/docs/intuition-sdk/integrations/react#related-resources "Direct link to Related Resources")
